title: codereview-pass-2-rusty-complete
description: Independent pass 2 on changed files (schc.c, hetero_node.rs). No violations of no_std/heapless (std bin intended), C11/Zephyr init (no init funcs), naming (SCHC_ for spec, lichen_ for project), or style (comments match existing complex module pattern). No dead code, no P3+ engineering issues found. Independent of pass 1.
